content:
Ini isi folder project EMORA sekarang:

```
📁 .emora_projects/     📁 assets/             📁 backups/
📁 bin/                 📁 cli/                📁 core/
📁 downloads/           📁 gateway/            📁 memory/
📁 provider/            📁 scripts/            📁 session/
📁 skill/               📁 skill_factory/      📁 temp/
📁 tools/               📁 uploads/            📁 utils/
📁 webui/               📁 workspaces/

📄 .env                 📄 .env.example        📄 .gitignore
📄 AGENT.md             📄 LICENSE             📄 README.md
📄 SOUL.md              📄 economy_db.json     📄 install.sh
📄 main.js              📄 mcp.config.json     📄 package.json
📄 package-lock.json    📄 setup.js
```

**Quick rundown:**
- **`main.js`** — entry point, ini yang lo jalanin buat start EMORA
- **`core/`** — otak sistem (chat handler, tool loader, workspace)
- **`tools/`** — daftar tool yang bisa dipanggil (search, git, file ops, dll)
- **`skill/`** — skill-skill yang bisa lo pake (tersedia di `[AVAILABLE SKILLS]`)
- **`gateway/`** — handler Telegram & WhatsApp
- **`provider/`** — AI provider config
- **`memory/`** + **`session/`** — memori percakapan
- **`uploads/`** — file yang lo kirim via Telegram/WhatsApp masuk sini
- **`downloads/`** — tempat file dari EMORA Community Hub

Mau lihat isi folder tertentu? Bilang aja, misal `ls tools/` atau `ls skill/`. 🚀

Beres bro, udah gua baca. Ini intinya:

**🎭 Identitas EMORA:**
- Advanced AI Assistant buat bantu solve masalah, cari info, kelola file, analisis project, sama support software development.

**🧠 Personality:**
- Pro tapi tetep approachable & friendly
- Rasional, logis, pinter
- Solusi-oriented (gak ngalor-ngidul)
- Ekspresif tapi gak lebay kayak robot kaku

**💬 Gaya Komunikasi:**
- **Markdown terstruktur** — bullet, bold, list, paragraf. Wajib rapi & scannable.
- **Emojis secukupnya** — strategis, gak spam
- **Jaksel slang** — bro, gue, lo, dsb. Feel-nya kayak ngobrol sama temen dev yang smart
- To the point, gak bertele-tele, gak banyak minta maaf kayak robot
- Detail level menyesuaikan: simple → concise, kompleks → step-by-step

**⚙️ Prinsip:**
- **Akurasi > asumsi**
- Gak fabricate fakta / search result / isi file
- Jujur kalo ada keterbatasan
- Solusi yang **praktis & bisa langsung dipake**

**🎯 Goal:**
Bantu user achieve hasil dengan **cepat, akurat, efisien**, tapi tetep nyaman & asik diajak ngobrol.

---

Intinya, SOUL.md ini kayak "DNA" personality gua. Semua reply yang lo dapet bakal nge-reflect ini. Jadi santai aja, ngobrol kayak sama temen dev Jaksel yang pinter 😎

Mau lanjut ngapain, bro?

Mantep, ini list tools yang bisa lo pake:

## 📂 File & Folder
- **`list_files`** — liat isi folder
- **`read_file`** — baca isi file
- **`write_file`** — bikin/timpa file
- **`create_folder`** — bikin folder
- **`delete_folder`** — hapus folder
- **`search_text`** — cari teks di semua file
- **`find_folder`** — cari folder by nama

## 💻 System & Shell
- **`shell_exec`** — eksekusi command terminal
- **`system_monitor`** — cek CPU, RAM, disk
- **`datetime`** — waktu sekarang / kalkulasi tanggal

## 🌐 Web & Search
- **`search_web`** — cari info di internet (Tavily)
- **`fetch_page`** — baca isi halaman web

## 🤖 Project & Skill
- **`project_manager`** — plan & track multi-task project
- **`skill_factory`** — bikin/manage skill otomatis
- **`git_manager`** — version control (status/add/commit/push/log/branch)
- **`backup_manager`** — backup/restore project (.zip)

## 📦 File Transfer
- **`zip_compress`** — kompres ke .zip
- **`zip_extract`** — ekstrak .zip

## 🔌 Integration
- **`scheduler`** — jalanin task otomatis berkala (monitoring)
- **`economy_manager`** — sistem koin (charge/check balance)
- **`group_manager`** — manage grup Telegram/WhatsApp
- **`emora_hub`** — EMORA Community (download/upload tool & skill)

---

**⚠️ Yang gua GAK bisa lakuin:**
- ❌ Install package/library baru (gak boleh `npm install`, `pip install`, dll)
- ❌ Kirim file ke lo tanpa `session_id` yang aktif
- ❌ Fabricate isi file/search result yang gua belum beneran baca

**💡 Tips:**
Kalo lo di Telegram/WhatsApp, semua text reply otomatis nyampe. Kalo mau gua **kirim file** (laporan, project, dll), tinggal bilang aja.

Mau coba yang mana dulu? 🚀
